Interface OpenRpcDocument

All Superinterfaces:
Document, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenRpc13Document, OpenRpc14Document, OpenRpc1xDocument
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenRpc13DocumentImpl, OpenRpc14DocumentImpl
public interface OpenRpcDocument extends Document
